messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0007",
  "title": "2025年6月份在投手游广告主超过 9万，每月新投手游均值接近 8000",
  "page_index": 8,
  "page_range": "8-9"
}

Section text:
2025年6月份在投手游广告主超过 9万，每月新投手游均值接近 8000
•2025年月均手游广告主超 8.4万名，同比增长了 21.9%，在6月份达到峰值超过 9万名，全年手游广告主超 40万；
•每月平均新增近 8000名手游广告主，月均占比 9.4%，其中 9、10、12这3个月占比超 10%，全年新广告主占比 23.4% ，与去年占比几乎持平。2025年全球手游 投放趋势观察
Source ：广大大，根据后台抓取后数据整理后展现
Date Range ：2025/1~2025/12
2025年月均在投广告主
同比21.9% ↑ 84.0K
2025年月均新投广告主占比
9.4% 月均新广告主： 7.9K8.1% 8.0%8.8%9.2%
8.9% 8.9%9.7% 9.6%10.8%
10.4% 9.9%10.2%
0 K10 K20 K30 K40 K50 K60 K70 K80 K90 K100 K
1月2月3月4月5月6月7月8月9月10月11月12月2025年全球手游各月广告主趋势
在投广告主 新广告主占比
51.6%
23.6% 23.4%
0 K100 K200 K300 K400 K500 K
2023年 2024年 2025年近3年手游广告主趋势
广告主 年新广告主占比
8

message.content: This section answers retrieval queries regarding the scale, growth trajectory, and new advertiser acquisition rates for the global mobile game advertising market in 2025. It provides specific metrics to answer questions on active advertiser volume (monthly average >84,000, June peak >90,000, annual total >400,000), year-over-year growth (21.9%), and new advertiser dynamics (monthly average ~8,000 at 9.4% share; September, October, and December exceed 10%; annual new advertiser share is 23.4%, stable year-over-year). The section includes figures charting monthly 2025 trends and a 2023–2025 three-year comparative trend. All claims and metrics are substantiated by backend scraped data from the ad intelligence platform 广大大, covering the January–December 2025 period.
